scale.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight leading-none font-playfair

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing, editorial layout. High use of negative space to emphasize luxury and focus on the jewelry.

flipbook.structure: Use HTMLFlipBook component. Render a Cover Page, then map products to pages. A product can take up a full spread (Left Page: High-res Image, Right Page: Product Details) or a single page depending on density.
flipbook.book_spine: Add a visual spine in the center when open, using CSS gradients (e.g., linear-gradient from transparent to rgba(0,0,0,0.1) back to transparent) to simulate the crease.

product_details.layout: Editorial layout. Model Code as a small overline label. Large Playfair heading for Karat/Name. Clean grid for selectors.

selectors.color: Circular color swatches with active ring indicator (Yellow Gold, White Gold, Rose Gold).
selectors.karat: Minimalist toggle buttons with 1px gold border.
selectors.width: Clean horizontal slider (2-10mm) or segmented controls. Gram weight should update dynamically based on width/karat.

admin_panel.layout: Dense, functional, clean table layout using Shadcn UI. Cardless UI where possible. High-contrast data rows.
admin_panel.forms: Use Shadcn Input, Select, and a drag-and-drop zone for GridFS image uploads.

images.description: Luxurious ivory and gold abstract cover
Deep warm ivory textured background with gold edge

audio.flip_sound: Use HTML5 Audio API. A standard page turn sound should play on the `onFlip` event if sound is toggled on.

motion.page_flip: 3D page turn via react-pageflip. Pages should have a hard cover for the front/back, and soft pages for the inside.
motion.hover_states: Buttons and links should have a subtle text color shift to gold (#D4AF37). No aggressive scaling.
motion.selectors: Smooth transitions for active state borders and background colors.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install `react-pageflip` (npm i react-pageflip) for the core catalog experience.
Install `lucide-react` for icons (volume toggle, arrows, etc.).
Configure Tailwind with custom fonts: `font-playfair` (Playfair Display) and `font-inter` (Inter). Add the colors from this JSON to tailwind.config.js.

IMPLEMENT FLIPBOOK CATALOG: NO standard card UI for products in the catalog view. The main interface MUST be a 3D book. Use a 2-page spread for desktop (Image on Left, Details on Right) and 1-page for mobile.
Ensure the flipbook pages have a realistic book spine effect (shadows in the center) and a textured background using the 'page_background_texture' image.
Implement a sound toggle button (Volume Icon) floating outside the book that plays a page flip sound on the `onFlip` callback of react-pageflip.

Build the 3 Catalogs (TNY, AS, ULT) logic: Auto-assign products based on their Model Code prefix (e.g., TNY-102 belongs to TNY catalog). Allow users to switch between these catalogs, showing the respective cover image.
Product details on the page MUST include: Model Code (overline), dynamic Gram calculation based on Karat and Width (2-10mm slider), and Color switch (Yellow/White/Rose).
Build the Admin Dashboard: Separate route (e.g., /admin). Build a simple product management table. Include forms for Add/Edit product.
IMPORTANT: Implement MongoDB GridFS for image storage as requested. The admin panel must allow uploading images that save to GridFS.
All interactive elements MUST include `data-testid` attributes (e.g., `data-testid="next-page-button"`, `data-testid="karat-selector-14k"`).
